# Attacks Overview

A comprehensive, auto-generated index of every attack cataloged in this taxonomy, organized by family. This file is the human-readable counterpart to [`attacks.yaml`](attacks.yaml); for mechanism definitions, inclusion/exclusion cues, and models tested per attack, follow the links from each family or start at the [taxonomy overview](taxonomy-overview.md).

Each family section is collapsed by default. Click a family to expand its attack table.
